S.FORM: Tinka Kurti kawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 12, Tinka Kurti, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tinka kurti kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, tinka kurti, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: tinka kurti kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, tinka kurti, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
